headline: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) Enters into a Definitive Agreement to Acquire Atraverse Medical
summary: Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) is one of the best low volatility stocks to invest in right now. On April 24, Johnson & Johnson (NYSE:JNJ) announced that it entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Atraverse Medical, Inc., which is a privately-held medical device company pioneering next-generation left-heart access and radiofrequency (RF) technology. The company reported […]
